identity: Human male chronomancer, middle-aged, full dark brown beard, sunken cheeks, pale glowing white eyes (glow effect, no pupils), hood casting shadow over the upper face with a faint gold hourglass rune glowing on the forehead.
outfit: Dark purple hooded robe with elaborate gold clockwork-pattern trim down the front and along the hood edges, layered shoulder drapes with gear motifs.
weapons: A golden hourglass filled with glowing pale sand held in the left hand. A dark wooden staff (optional, absent in portrait) can be added for combat poses.
attackStyle: East-facing. Hourglass thrust forward in the left hand, right hand extended releasing a ripple of pale gold time-energy toward the enemy.
spellStyle: East-facing. Hourglass held in front of the chest in both hands, sand suspended mid-fall, gold clockwork runes floating around the body.
blockStyle: East-facing. Hourglass held across the chest in both hands, hood up, faint gold aura.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, hourglass fallen beside him with sand spilled, head bowed, hood slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Hourglass held in the left hand at chest height, right hand at his side, hood up, gold clockwork trim prominent.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep purple hood with elaborate gold clockwork trim, dark brown beard, glowing pale white eyes, gold hourglass rune on the forehead, golden hourglass with glowing sand held in the left hand.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male chronomancer, middle-aged, full dark brown beard, sunken cheeks, pale glowing white eyes (glow effect, no pupils), hood casting shadow over the upper face with a faint gold hourglass rune glowing on the forehead.

OUTFIT: Dark purple hooded robe with elaborate gold clockwork-pattern trim down the front and along the hood edges, layered shoulder drapes with gear motifs.

WEAPONS: A golden hourglass filled with glowing pale sand held in the left hand. A dark wooden staff (optional, absent in portrait) can be added for combat poses.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male chronomancer, middle-aged, full dark brown beard, sunken cheeks, pale glowing white eyes (glow effect, no pupils), hood casting shadow over the upper face with a faint gold hourglass rune glowing on the forehead.

OUTFIT: Dark purple hooded robe with elaborate gold clockwork-pattern trim down the front and along the hood edges, layered shoulder drapes with gear motifs.

WEAPONS: A golden hourglass filled with glowing pale sand held in the left hand. A dark wooden staff (optional, absent in portrait) can be added for combat poses.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep purple hood with elaborate gold clockwork trim, dark brown beard, glowing pale white eyes, gold hourglass rune on the forehead, golden hourglass with glowing sand held in the left hand.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
